_meta.source: Amounts sourced from legacy ChamberWare transaction history (NC_payment_orders, 2018–2026). 'New Membership' dues clustered at $300 (most common), $350, and $450, with occasional $1,500 corporate; renewals commonly $275–$300. Donations actually received: $25/$50/$100/$150/$300. Tier NAMES below are descriptive labels — confirm final naming with the Chamber; the PRICES are real.
_meta.confirm: Diana to confirm tier names + whether dues are flat per tier or an employee-based sliding scale.

memberships.label: Business Membership
memberships.blurb: Most popular — full directory listing, events, and referrals.

memberships.label: Premier Membership
memberships.blurb: Added visibility and priority event placement.

membership_renewal.label: Membership Renewal
membership_renewal.note: Standard renewal; office may apply a discounted rate (commonly $275).

tickets.note: Event tickets are priced per event by admins. Each ticketed event uses sku 'ticket:<eventId>' with the event's price.
